title: cynoglossum alticola
intro: Cynoglossum alticola, also known as the alticola hound's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, Boraginaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum alticola include relieving coughs and congestion, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum alticola is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, with some practitioners also recommending it as a component in respiratory-supporting blends.
